articles.author: Dmytro Hubenko
articles.title: Taiwan's president visits Eswatini despite China's objection - DW.com
articles.description: The visit of Taiwan's President Lai Ching-te to the African country was delayed after several countries reportedly withdrew permission for him to fly over their territories due to pressure from China.
articles.content:
Taiwan's President Lai Ching-te arrived in the African nation of Eswatini on Saturday, announcing the trip on social media.
In a post on X, he said that he had arrived in Taiwan's only diplomatic al… [+2461 chars]
